'pattern' => '^(http|https)\\://\\S+', ], 'UserIdentity' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'required' => [ 'id', ], 'members' => [ 'id' => [ 'shape' => 'IdentityId', ], ], ], 'ValidationException' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'message' => [ 'shape' => 'ErrorMessage', ], ], 'error' => [ 'httpStatusCode' => 400, ], 'exception' => true, ], 'VariableName' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 64, 'min' => 1, 'pattern' => '^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$', ], 'VariableValue' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'propertyId' => [ 'shape' => 'Macro', ], 'hierarchyId' => [ 'shape' => 'Macro', ], 'propertyPath' => [ 'shape' => 'AssetModelPropertyPath', ], ], ], 'Variant' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'stringValue' => [ 'shape' => 'PropertyValueStringValue', ], 'integerValue' => [ 'shape' => 'PropertyValueIntegerValue', ], 'doubleValue' => [ 'shape' => 'PropertyValueDoubleValue', ], 'booleanValue' => [ 'shape' => 'PropertyValueBooleanValue', ], 'nullValue' => [ 'shape' => 'PropertyValueNullValue', ], ], ], 'Version' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'max' => 10, 'min' => 1, 'pattern' => '^(0|([1-9]{1}\\d*))$', ], 'WarmTierRetentionPeriod' => [ 'type' => 'structure', 'members' => [ 'numberOfDays' => [ 'shape' => 'NumberOfDays', ], 'unlimited' => [ 'shape' => 'Unlimited', ], ], ], 'WarmTierState' => [ 'type' => 'string', 'enum' => [ 'ENABLED', 'DISABLED', ], ], ],];
